the42Front
AboutFriendsMotW

The Shitty Trip to Hong Kong Organized by school. DAY 1

Mar 28, 2026 • the42game

CONtext

So I got lucky enough to grab this chance to “study”/”tour” around HKU for two days plus a night staying at an hotel, all FREE.
I wasn’t seeking for this “rare” chance tbh, since I had a lot of chance to visit Hong Kong, so I was like “lmao it gotta have some huge red flags behind that”, which is true.
Tho after one of my friend said “hey they require some sort of English proficiency, you could give it a try.” so I sign up and yeah… thats how I got here, typing this rant on a resturant table after continious shit shows and my Concerta starting wear itself off, FURIOUS REALLY.
So now I am pack with tons of strangers, forced to interact with them, albeit i didn’t do much tho lol.

The before hand.

So before the “tour” we need to grab a Entry Permit to Hong Kong ofc, since we’re from a huge major world power but I can’t access a part of my proud country freely, albeit I actually support that scheme… and know why this is the case, but still rather annoying, not the policy, but the ppl came from down from villages asking how to grab a EP, which type, and I was like can’t you guys just ref to the school guidence?
So anyway, after all us lucky ass grabbo the Entry Permit, went to a meeting about the trip that’s about to set to happen in the vaguest word possible, and most annoyingly you soon realized this is more of a media PR trip than an actuall trip to learn/experience, and you are the guys to be under the spotlight.

For instance, you need to wear that stupid low quality T-shirt 24*7 lmao, and they all assume all men should wear 2XL, and all women wear L… and me and my dormmate be like: …fine

And you know what’s the most outragerous thing? They took your Travel Documents away to keep them “for” you, “to prevent someone lost it in the process”, ughhh…

Okay and theres your team work stuff, basically you need to work with a tons of strangers on something stupid that I will talk about later.

On-the-Set.

Although the Checkpoint we will be crossing is like physically right across my house for a 5mins walk, but they still ask me join at school so I can’t leave on Friday for home.

And guess what is the first thing we do? Taking silly pictures of course, for PR of course! Even videos.
And that will be the vide for the next 36hrs.

Get on a bus and we set off.

The first leg: HKU CYM Canteen with random food… and some touring

/PLACEHOLDER FOR PICS OF FOOD/

You have no choice, pull a ticket and call it your food, I still have some faith in CYM Canteen, but just the fact that I don’t have a choice so idk, maybe I will try it again when I go to HKU with my own foot next time.

It was so spicy and I need something to drink, and they won’t allow you to get out and return in 2mins just to grab something refreshing off the Swire Coca Cola vends, NOPE.
And I have to promise I will be back with my backpack look after by them, and return with-in 2mins, which I did.
So we set off for a tour in the school by a somewhat alumni related to our school and now studying in HKU, i guess.
Just a complete waste of time tho, not her fault, by our schools’ fault, those teachers from our school kept suggesting stupid things and always asking us to line up like we’re some soldiers from the Soviets during Afghan-Soviet War (feel sad for them tho).

Course ONE, the Metaverse shit but on Roblox as well… ughh…

So we took this class lectured by a idk PhD of Data Science in HKU, for a topic I will just laugh about at, and her English accent was straight out bad, even for SEA English or Hong Kong English, even I could barely understand what the hell she was trying to talk about, and everything she saids, from my guessing, translated from Cantonese to English in her head so the logic is still rather… Chinese, you get the vibe, tldr, not being a Chinese/Cantonese user you won’t be able to understand it.

Quite funny enough tho, I played Touhou on that PC so… whatever, and Extreme Tux Racer.

DINNER COURSE

Nothing to write home about… just normal Cantonese Resturant serving Dim Sun during the day serving dinner…
After a EXHAUSTING day it just taste so good I have nothing to complain about.

Victoria Harbor on that Tsim Sha Tsui side that are suppose to be located “Right next to HKU Campus” according to an idiot, and the subsequent shitty “survey” we need to conduct.

Right after the dinner we hopped onto the bus, again. We are now heading to Tsim Sha Tsui, that according to some specific tour guide, is “just a few minutes drive from here”, remember that we’re still in Sai Wan (aka 500m away from liason office) at this point, an I was like: Sure…

And I am lazy to descibe what we did there but in brief: Annoying College Student being force to conduct field surveys and ofc I did nothing.

Set off to hotel is the only option now to call it a day.

Hotel

Kinda nice no complaints, albeit I have to share a double bed room with another stranger in the group albeit not all that of a stranger but still a stranger so whatever.
At least now I could just lie on bed and watch BBC World and NHK World Japan and ABC via satellite after a quick shower, ofc why not, which is ever better.

Any conclusions of the day?

Nope, I write the last 50% of this JOURNAL a whole week later and you could see why, exhausting as hell, boring, and the fact that I really hate for being treat like an idiot.

I spent like almost 3 days after this mostly in sleep mode albeit ofc I still attended class but just sleep on the class which is something that I mostly refuse to do but I am so sleepy I can’t…

There will be an Day 2 on this but for now, let’s call it Day 1 done, as a record.
